title: Section 25
content: 1* * * All the provisions of 2Act 25 of 1836, of the Governor General of India in council, relating to private licensed Warehouses, shall be applicable to all Warehouses wherein the said Association shall receive bonded Goods.
footnote: 1. The words "And it is hereby enacted, that" omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I. 2. Rep. by the Repealing Act, 1873 (12 of 1873).
